message:
🌱 Add tikv: Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build` mission (#764)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "tikv-6087-make-tikv-compilable-with-cargo-build",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "tikv: Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`",
+    "description": "Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current tikv deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your tiup --version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nhelm list -n tikv 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working tikv installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tikv configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant tikv configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get configmap -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tikv\n```\nCurrently TiKV can't be compiled with `cargo build`. It's not friendly with IDEs. Please take a look, thanks!"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`",
+        "description": "###  What have you changed?\n\nAdd `protobuf-codec` as a default feature, as we need either `protobuf-codec` or `prost-codec`\n\n###  What is the type of the changes?\n\nPick one of the following and delete the others:\n\n- Bugfix (a change which fixes an issue)\n\n###  How is the PR tested?\n\n- Manually, build TiKV using Clion, or just `cargo build`\n\n###  Does this PR affect documentation (docs) or should it be mentioned in the release notes?\n\nNo\n\n###  Does this PR affect `tidb-ansible`?\n\nNo\n\n###  Refer\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get events -n tikv --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "###  What have you changed?\n\nAdd `protobuf-codec` as a default feature, as we need either `protobuf-codec` or `prost-codec`\n\n###  What is the type of the changes?\n\nPick one of the following and delete the others:\n\n- Bugfix (a change which fixes an issue)\n\n###  How is the PR tested?\n\n- Manually, build TiKV using Clion, or just `cargo build`\n\n###  Does this PR affect documentation (docs) or should\n\nSee the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "tikv",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl",
+      "tikv-ctl",
+      "tiup"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running TiKV cluster (standalone or deployed on Kubernetes via TiDB Operator). TiUP and tikv-ctl are the primary CLI tools for managing TiKV."
+  },
